title: [Journey's End, Lounge]
description: This expansive lounge feels vast, furnished with deep leather couches paired with mahogany side tables.  Tall curtained windows along the northern wall soften any light that spills in.  A long driftwood bar spans the space in front of the windows.  The eastern wall is claimed by a massive stone fireplace crowned by a thick mantle, while on the opposite wall a dark mahogany double door opens into an adjoining bedchamber.  Polished hardwood floors complement raised-panel wainscoting covering the walls.
